text: paulos kai silouanos kai timotheos tē ekklēsia thessalonikeōn en theō patri kai kyriō iēsou christō charis ymin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kyriou iēsou christou
eucharistoumen tō theō pantote peri pantōn ymōn mneian ymōn poioumenoi epi tōn proseuchōn ēmōn
adialeiptōs mnēmoneuontes ymōn tou ergou tēs pisteōs kai tou kopou tēs agapēs kai tēs ypomonēs tēs elpidos tou kyriou ēmōn iēsou christou emprosthen tou theou kai patros ēmōn
eidotes adelphoi ēgapēmenoi ypo theou tēn eklogēn ymōn
oti to euangelion ēmōn ouk egenēthē eis ymas en logō monon alla kai en dynamei kai en pneumati agiō kai en plērophoria pollē kathōs oidate oioi egenēthēmen en ymin di ymas
kai ymeis mimētai ēmōn egenēthēte kai tou kyriou dexamenoi ton logon en thlipsei pollē meta charas pneumatos agiou
ōste genesthai ymas typous pasin tois pisteuousin en tē makedonia kai tē achaia
aph ymōn gar exēchētai o logos tou kyriou ou monon en tē makedonia kai achaia alla kai en panti topō ē pistis ymōn ē pros ton theon exelēlythen ōste mē chreian ēmas echein lalein ti
autoi gar peri ēmōn apangellousin opoian eisodon echomen pros ymas kai pōs epestrepsate pros ton theon apo tōn eidōlōn douleuein theō zōnti kai alēthinō
kai anamenein ton uion autou ek tōn ouranōn on ēgeiren ek nekrōn iēsoun ton ryomenon ēmas apo tēs orgēs tēs erchomenēs
autoi gar oidate adelphoi tēn eisodon ēmōn tēn pros ymas oti ou kenē gegonen
alla kai propathontes kai ybristhentes kathōs oidate en philippois eparrēsiasametha en tō theō ēmōn lalēsai pros ymas to euangelion tou theou en pollō agōni
ē gar paraklēsis ēmōn ouk ek planēs oude ex akatharsias oute en dolō
alla kathōs dedokimasmetha ypo tou theou pisteuthēnai to euangelion outōs laloumen ouch ōs anthrōpois areskontes alla tō theō tō dokimazonti tas kardias ēmōn
oute gar pote en logō kolakeias egenēthēmen kathōs oidate oute en prophasei pleonexias theos martys
oute zētountes ex anthrōpōn doxan oute aph ymōn oute ap allōn dynamenoi en barei einai ōs christou apostoloi
all egenēthēmen ēpioi en mesō ymōn ōs an trophos thalpē ta eautēs tekna
outōs imeiromenoi ymōn eudokoumen metadounai ymin ou monon to euangelion tou theou alla kai tas eautōn psychas dioti agapētoi ēmin gegenēsthe
mnēmoneuete gar adelphoi ton kopon ēmōn kai ton mochthon nyktos gar kai ēmeras ergazomenoi pros to mē epibarēsai tina ymōn ekēryxamen eis ymas to euangelion tou theou
ymeis martyres kai o theos ōs osiōs kai dikaiōs kai amemptōs ymin tois pisteuousin egenēthēmen
kathaper oidate ōs ena ekaston ymōn ōs patēr tekna eautou parakalountes ymas kai paramythoumenoi
kai martyroumenoi eis to peripatēsai ymas axiōs tou theou tou kalountos ymas eis tēn eautou basileian kai doxan

dia touto kai ēmeis eucharistoumen tō theō adialeiptōs oti paralabontes logon akoēs par ēmōn tou theou edexasthe ou logon anthrōpōn alla kathōs estin alēthōs logon theou os kai energeitai en ymin tois pisteuousin
ymeis gar mimētai egenēthēte adelphoi tōn ekklēsiōn tou theou tōn ousōn en tē ioudaia en christō iēsou oti tauta epathete kai ymeis ypo tōn idiōn symphyletōn kathōs kai autoi ypo tōn ioudaiōn
tōn kai ton kyrion apokteinantōn iēsoun kai tous idious prophētas kai ēmas ekdiōxantōn kai theō mē areskontōn kai pasin anthrōpois enantiōn
kōlyontōn ēmas tois ethnesin lalēsai ina sōthōsin eis to anaplērōsai autōn tas amartias pantote ephthasen de ep autous ē orgē eis telos
ēmeis de adelphoi apophanisthentes aph ymōn pros kairon ōras prosōpō ou kardia perissoterōs espoudasamen to prosōpon ymōn idein en pollē epithymia
dio ēthelēsamen elthein pros ymas egō men paulos kai apax kai dis kai enekopsen ēmas o satanas
tis gar ēmōn elpis ē chara ē stephanos kauchēseōs ē ouchi kai ymeis emprosthen tou kyriou ēmōn iēsou christou en tē autou parousia
ymeis gar este ē doxa ēmōn kai ē chara
dio mēketi stegontes eudokēsamen kataleiphthēnai en athēnais monoi
kai epempsamen timotheon ton adelphon ēmōn kai diakonon tou theou kai synergon ēmōn en tō euangeliō tou christou eis to stērixai ymas kai parakalesai ymas peri tēs pisteōs ymōn
tō mēdena sainesthai en tais thlipsesin tautais autoi gar oidate oti eis touto keimetha
kai gar ote pros ymas ēmen proelegomen ymin oti mellomen thlibesthai kathōs kai egeneto kai oidate
dia touto kagō mēketi stegōn epempsa eis to gnōnai tēn pistin ymōn mēpōs epeirasen ymas o peirazōn kai eis kenon genētai o kopos ēmōn
arti de elthontos timotheou pros ēmas aph ymōn kai euangelisamenou ēmin tēn pistin kai tēn agapēn ymōn kai oti echete mneian ēmōn agathēn pantote epipothountes ēmas idein kathaper kai ēmeis ymas
dia touto pareklēthēmen adelphoi eph ymin epi pasē tē thlipsei kai anankē ēmōn dia tēs ymōn pisteōs
oti nyn zōmen ean ymeis stēkēte en kyriō
tina gar eucharistian dynametha tō theō antapodounai peri ymōn epi pasē tē chara ē chairomen di ymas emprosthen tou theou ēmōn
nyktos kai ēmeras yper ekperissou deomenoi eis to idein ymōn to prosōpon kai katartisai ta ysterēmata tēs pisteōs ymōn
autos de o theos kai patēr ēmōn kai o kyrios ēmōn iēsous christos kateuthynai tēn odon ēmōn pros ymas
ymas de o kyrios pleonasai kai perisseusai tē agapē eis allēlous kai eis pantas kathaper kai ēmeis eis ymas
eis to stērixai ymōn tas kardias amemptous en agiōsynē emprosthen tou theou kai patros ēmōn en tē parousia tou kyriou ēmōn iēsou christou meta pantōn tōn agiōn autou
to loipon oun adelphoi erōtōmen ymas kai parakaloumen en kyriō iēsou kathōs parelabete par ēmōn to pōs dei ymas peripatein kai areskein theō ina perisseuēte mallon
oidate gar tinas parangelias edōkamen ymin dia tou kyriou iēsou
touto gar estin thelēma tou theou o agiasmos ymōn apechesthai ymas apo tēs porneias
eidenai ekaston ymōn to eautou skeuos ktasthai en agiasmō kai timē
mē en pathei epithymias kathaper kai ta ethnē ta mē eidota ton theon
to mē yperbainein kai pleonektein en tō pragmati ton adelphon autou dioti ekdikos o kyrios peri pantōn toutōn kathōs kai proeipamen ymin kai diemartyrametha
ou gar ekalesen ēmas o theos epi akatharsia all en agiasmō
toigaroun o athetōn ouk anthrōpon athetei alla ton theon ton kai donta to pneuma autou to agion eis ēmas
peri de tēs philadelphias ou chreian echete graphein ymin autoi gar ymeis theodidaktoi este eis to agapan allēlous
kai gar poieite auto eis pantas tous adelphous tous en olē tē makedonia parakaloumen de ymas adelphoi perisseuein mallon
kai philotimeisthai ēsychazein kai prassein ta idia kai ergazesthai tais idiais chersin ymōn kathōs ymin parēngeilamen
ina peripatēte euschēmonōs pros tous exō kai mēdenos chreian echēte
ou thelō de ymas agnoein adelphoi peri tōn kekoimēmenōn ina mē lypēsthe kathōs kai oi loipoi oi mē echontes elpida
ei gar pisteuomen oti iēsous apethanen kai anestē outōs kai o theos tous koimēthentas dia tou iēsou axei syn autō
touto gar ymin legomen en logō kyriou oti ēmeis oi zōntes oi perileipomenoi eis tēn parousian tou kyriou ou mē phthasōmen tous koimēthentas
oti autos o kyrios en keleusmati en phōnē archangelou kai en salpingi theou katabēsetai ap ouranou kai oi nekroi en christō anastēsontai prōton
epeita ēmeis oi zōntes oi perileipomenoi ama syn autois arpagēsometha en nephelais eis apantēsin tou kyriou eis aera kai outōs pantote syn kyriō esometha
ōste parakaleite allēlous en tois logois toutois
peri de tōn chronōn kai tōn kairōn adelphoi ou chreian echete ymin graphesthai
autoi gar akribōs oidate oti ē ēmera kyriou ōs kleptēs en nykti outōs erchetai
otan gar legōsin eirēnē kai asphaleia tote aiphnidios autois ephistatai olethros ōsper ē ōdin tē en gastri echousē kai ou mē ekphygōsin
ymeis de adelphoi ouk este en skotei ina ē ēmera ymas ōs kleptēs katalabē
pantes ymeis uioi phōtos este kai uioi ēmeras ouk esmen nyktos oude skotous
ara oun mē katheudōmen ōs kai oi loipoi alla grēgorōmen kai nēphōmen
oi gar katheudontes nyktos katheudousin kai oi methyskomenoi nyktos methyousin
ēmeis de ēmeras ontes nēphōmen endysamenoi thōraka pisteōs kai agapēs kai perikephalaian elpida sōtērias
oti ouk etheto ēmas o theos eis orgēn all eis peripoiēsin sōtērias dia tou kyriou ēmōn iēsou christou
tou apothanontos yper ēmōn ina eite grēgorōmen eite katheudōmen ama syn autō zēsōmen
dio parakaleite allēlous kai oikodomeite eis ton ena kathōs kai poieite
erōtōmen de ymas adelphoi eidenai tous kopiōntas en ymin kai proistamenous ymōn en kyriō kai nouthetountas ymas
kai ēgeisthai autous yper ekperissou en agapē dia to ergon autōn eirēneuete en eautois
parakaloumen de ymas adelphoi noutheteite tous ataktous paramytheisthe tous oligopsychous antechesthe tōn asthenōn makrothymeite pros pantas
orate mē tis kakon anti kakou tini apodō alla pantote to agathon diōkete kai eis allēlous kai eis pantas
pantote chairete
adialeiptōs proseuchesthe
en panti eucharisteite touto gar thelēma theou en christō iēsou eis ymas
to pneuma mē sbennyte
prophēteias mē exoutheneite
panta dokimazete to kalon katechete
apo pantos eidous ponērou apechesthe
autos de o theos tēs eirēnēs agiasai ymas oloteleis kai oloklēron ymōn to pneuma kai ē psychē kai to sōma amemptōs en tē parousia tou kyriou ēmōn iēsou christou tērētheiē
pistos o kalōn ymas os kai poiēsei
adelphoi proseuchesthe peri ēmōn
aspasasthe tous adelphous pantas en philēmati agiō
orkizō ymas ton kyrion anagnōsthēnai tēn epistolēn pasin tois agiois adelphois
ē charis tou kyriou ēmōn iēsou christou meth ymōn amēn [pros thessalonikeis prōtē egraphē apo athēnōn]
